places.name: The Table

places.name: Wolfs Junge

places.goodToKnow: ⭐ 4.8 ★ (317) · Not halal; menu changes daily — pork appears but fish/veg always present, staff flag ingredients happily; casual at lunch, menu-style at dinner; book; $$-$$$

places.name: Haerlin

places.address: Fairmont Hotel Vier Jahreszeiten, Neuer Jungfernstieg 9-14, 20354 Hamburg

places.name: Lakeside (The Fontenay)

places.goodToKnow: ⭐ 4.8 ★ (127) · Not halal, alcohol served; fish/veg menus straightforward; elegant tasting-only room — best for parents or with the 17/15-year-olds; book well ahead; $$$$

places.name: Köz Urfa

places.name: Ti Breizh - Haus der Bretagne

places.name: Fischereihafen Restaurant

places.name: HYGGE Brasserie & Bar
places.near: Near Klein Flottbek S-Bahn (S1); ~25 min from center — pairs with Jenischpark
places.order: Fish of the day, veggie bowls, duck; children's portions available

places.goodToKnow: ⭐ 4.7 ★ (1,088) · Not halal but pork-free ordering easy (fish/veg/poultry); genuinely family-friendly with garden; Bib Gourmand value; book weekends; $$-$$$ · Location needs verification

places.name: Jellyfish

places.goodToKnow: ⭐ 4.7 ★ (817) · Menu is fish/seafood only — naturally pork-free (alcohol served, not halal-certified); more relaxed than most starred rooms but still menu-driven; book ahead; $$$$

places.name: Landhaus Scherrer
places.near: Bus 36/112 along Elbchaussee; 10 min taxi from Landungsbrücken
places.order: North Sea turbot, catch of the day, vegetarian menu; skip the famous crispy pork classics

places.famousFor: Michelin-starred Elbchaussee institution (since 1978) refining North German classics; à la carte and more family-workable than most starred rooms
places.goodToKnow: ⭐ 4.7 ★ (532) · Pork features on the menu (their signature) but fish/veg à la carte is strong — order around it; not halal; à la carte = kid-flexible; book ahead; $$$$

places.name: bianc

places.notes: Chef change to Marvin Böhm Feb 2026 per t-online/nordische-esskultur

places.goodToKnow: ⭐ 4.7 ★ (449) · Not halal, wine-centric; fish/veg easily arranged; verify current menu style post-chef-change before booking; tasting-menu room, teens OK; $$$$

places.name: Brechtmanns Bistro
places.near: Short walk from Eppendorfer Baum U-Bahn (U1/U3)
places.order: Whole crispy duck for the table, tuna tataki, curries, veggie wok dishes
places.notes: Bib Gourmand + duck signature per Michelin/restaurantguru search Jul 2026
places.famousFor: Bib Gourmand Asian-German fusion by Sven Brechtmann — famous whole crispy duck feast for 2-4, ideal for a family table
places.goodToKnow: ⭐ 4.7 ★ (333) · Not halal but duck/fish/veg-centric — easy pork-free ordering; relaxed bistro good with kids; book for the duck; $$-$$$

places.name: Tazzi Pizza

places.name: RIVE Bistro

places.order: Oysters, bouillabaisse, whole fish from the grill, fischbrötchen deluxe at lunch

places.goodToKnow: ⭐ 4.6 ★ (1,548) · Fish-first menu — pork-free trivial; alcohol served; terrace is the prize in August, book it; kids welcome; $$$

places.name: Au Quai

places.order: Tuna, scallops, catch of the day, wok dishes; good salads and fries for kids

places.goodToKnow: ⭐ 4.6 ★ (1,122) · Not halal but seafood-led, pork rare on menu; sunset terrace very popular in summer — reserve outdoor table; $$$

places.name: Nikkei Nine
places.near: Jungfernstieg U/S-Bahn, 4 min walk
places.order: Sushi/sashimi platters, black cod miso, wagyu (beef), tuna tataki, vegetable robata
places.notes: Flagship Japanese at HVJ per hotel site and Hamburg dining press
places.famousFor: Glamorous Nikkei hotspot in the Vier Jahreszeiten — Hamburg's most talked-about high-end Japanese; superb sushi, robata and wagyu
places.goodToKnow: ⭐ 4.6 ★ (1,038) · Not halal-certified but fish/beef/veg menu = effortless pork-free; buzzy scene, older kids fine, book well ahead (hardest table in town); $$$$
places.address: Fairmont Hotel Vier Jahreszeiten, Neuer Jungfernstieg 9-14, 20354 Hamburg

places.name: Spaccaforno

places.order: Margherita, marinara, burrata pizza, veggie specials; tuna/anchovy options — avoid salami/ham toppings

places.goodToKnow: ⭐ 4.6 ★ (1,005) · Italian menu has pork salumi — plenty of veg/fish pizzas instead; casual, quick, ideal kids' lunch; walk-in mostly; $-$$

places.name: Deichgraf

places.goodToKnow: ⭐ 4.6 ★ (803) · Not halal but fish-led — easy pork-free; charming historic rooms, fine with kids early evening; reserve; $$$

places.name: Brücke 10

places.goodToKnow: ⭐ 4.5 ★ (10,496) · Everything is fish — naturally pork-free; counter service, outdoor tables, expect a queue at noon; $; perfect pre-harbor-tour stop
places.address: Bei den St. Pauli-Landungsbrücken, Brücke 10, 20359 Hamburg

places.name: Bullerei
places.near: 2 min from Sternschanze S/U-Bahn

places.goodToKnow: ⭐ 4.5 ★ (2,684) · Not halal-certified but sushi/fish/beef-led = easy pork-free; cocktail-bar vibe later in the evening — book an early table outside; $$$

places.name: Cornelia Poletto

places.name: Jahreszeiten Grill

places.name: Burgerlich

places.goodToKnow: ⭐ 4.4 ★ (6,471) · Kiosk-casual, no reservations, cash smart; serves beer/wine; perfect August afternoon with the kids on the sand; $

places.name: Clouds - Heaven's Bar & Kitchen

places.goodToKnow: ⭐ 4.4 ★ (3,849) · Bar-forward/alcohol-centric ambience, especially late — go early evening with family; food is genuinely good beef/fish; book window/terrace; $$$-$$$$

places.name: Burgerlich Gänsemarkt

places.notes: Saved POI

places.goodToKnow: ⭐ 4.4 ★ (2,418) · Fast-casual; fresh daily ingredients; vegetarian/vegan options; Kids Corner play area; open daily from 11:30.

places.name: Störtebeker Elbphilharmonie

places.goodToKnow: ⭐ 4.4 ★ (2,122) · Brewery-branded (alcohol-centric identity) but full food menu with fish/veg/beef; casual, very family-OK; book window tables; $$-$$$

places.name: VLET in der Speicherstadt

places.name: Café Paris

places.name: carls an der Elbphilharmonie

places.name: Saliba Alsterarkaden

places.name: Friends & Brgrs Hamburg

places.name: Quarkerei (Europa Passage)

places.name: Bonscheladen

places.famousFor: Hamburg's favourite homegrown ice-cream maker since 2013 — 100% natural ingredients, creative flavours, homemade sauces and toppings; now ~10 branches city-wide

places.goodToKnow: 2026: Alster round trip adults EUR 20, kids to 16 EUR 10, FAMILY ticket (2 adults + up to 4 kids) EUR 50 — ideal for this family; 2h canal trip EUR 26/13 with English audioguide · Kids: All ages

places.name: Swan Pedal Boats on the Outer Alster
places.near: Rental jetties around the Outer Alster, e.g. Bootsvermietung Dornheim; U1 Hallerstraße or bus to Alsterufer
places.notes: Rental prices from hamburg.com Alster boat-rental page
places.famousFor: Renting swan- and flamingo-shaped pedal boats (and SUPs/rowboats) on the Outer Alster lake with skyline views
places.goodToKnow: Approx. EUR 14/h swan pedal boat (2p), EUR 15.50/h flamingo (4p) at Dornheim — family of 7 needs 2-3 boats; no license needed; life jackets for the 5-year-old; weather dependent · Location needs verification · Kids: All ages (life vests)

places.name: Tierpark Hagenbeck & Tropen-Aquarium
places.near: U2 to Hagenbecks Tierpark station, at the gate
places.notes: Hours/prices from hagenbeck.de via tourispo/trip.com 2026 summaries (combo prices approximate)
places.famousFor: Legendary 1907 zoo that invented the open, moat-based enclosure — elephant feeding, Eismeer polar world, and a walk-through Tropen-Aquarium
places.goodToKnow: In Aug open to 19:00; approx. adults EUR 24 / kids 4-16 EUR 16.50, zoo+aquarium combo ~EUR 34/25 (est.); buying feed for the elephants is the highlight for kids; full day easily · Kids: All ages; stroller-friendly

places.name: Planten un Blomen
places.near: U1 Stephansplatz or U2 Messehallen; multiple entrances
places.notes: Park info from plantenunblomen.hamburg.de / hamburg.com
places.famousFor: 47-hectare free city park — Japanese garden with teahouse, rose garden, huge Bullerberge adventure playground and water features
places.goodToKnow: Free, open early till ~23:00 in summer; playgrounds and water-play areas perfect for the 5- and 9-year-olds; daytime fountain displays 16:00 & 18:00; pack picnic · Kids: All ages; stroller-friendly
places.address: Marseiller Straße / St. Petersburger Straße, 20355 Hamburg

places.name: Wasserlichtkonzerte (Water Light Concerts)
places.near: Parksee inside Planten un Blomen, near U1 Stephansplatz entrance
places.notes: 2026 schedule from wasserlichtspiele-hamburg.de (May-Aug 22:00 daily)
places.famousFor: Free nightly choreographed fountain show with colored lights and music on the Parksee — a Hamburg summer institution since 1935
places.goodToKnow: During your dates (Aug 2026) nightly at 22:00, ~30 min, FREE, no booking; late for the 5-year-old but magical; bring a blanket, arrive 20 min early for lakeside seats · Location needs verification · Kids: All ages; late for 5yo

places.name: Hamburger Sommerdom Funfair
places.near: U3 St. Pauli or U2 Messehallen, direct
places.notes: 2026 dates/hours from hamburg.de DOM Termine page
places.famousFor: North Germany's biggest folk festival — Ferris wheel, coasters, kiddie rides and food alleys; runs 24 Jul-30 Aug 2026, exactly over your visit
places.goodToKnow: Free entry, pay per ride; Mon-Thu 15:00-23:00, Fri/Sat to 24:00, Sun 14:00-23:00; Wednesday = Family Day with reduced ride prices; fireworks every Friday 22:30 · Kids: Height limits for 5yo

places.name: LEGO Discovery Centre Hamburg
places.near: U4 Überseequartier, inside Westfield Hamburg-Überseequartier
places.notes: Prices/age policy from legodiscoverycentre.com plan-your-visit
places.famousFor: Germany's first LEGO Discovery Centre (2025) — MINILAND Hamburg in bricks, rides, 4D cinema and build zones
places.goodToKnow: From ~EUR 23.50 pp online; aimed at ages 2-10 — perfect for the 5- and 9-year-olds while teens shop in the mall; adults admitted only WITH children; book timed slot · Kids: Best 5-11; teens find it young

places.name: Port des Lumières
places.near: U4 Überseequartier, steps from the exit
places.notes: Show/booking details from port-lumieres.com and hamburg.com
places.famousFor: Hamburg's first permanent immersive art hall — floor-to-ceiling projections (Klimt + Hundertwasser show through 2026) over 1,700 m2, with Infinity Room and Kids Studio
places.goodToKnow: Timed 30-min entry slots — weekend afternoons sell out 2-3 days ahead, book online; visit ~1h; dark but not scary — fine for all ages; extremely Instagrammable · Kids: All ages

places.name: Discovery Dock
places.near: U3 Baumwall, 5 min walk toward Elbphilharmonie
places.notes: Details from hh-mit-kindern.de / funke-ticket.de Discovery Dock pages
places.famousFor: 55-min interactive tour of the invisible port — load a container ship in VR, hunt smugglers with customs, watch live ship data
places.goodToKnow: Daily ~10:00-19:00; ~EUR 17.50 pp (est.); recommended age 10+ — great for the 11/15/17-year-olds while others do the Plaza next door; book a slot online · Kids: Best 9+

places.name: Chocoversum Chocolate Museum
places.near: U1 Meßberg, directly opposite
places.notes: 2026 prices from chocoversum.de / hamburg-travel.com
places.famousFor: 90-min guided tour from cocoa bean to bar with tastings at every step — every visitor makes their own chocolate bar to take home
places.goodToKnow: Adults EUR 29, kids 6-17 EUR 15, under 6 free (+EUR 4.50 if they make a bar); tours are timed — book an English tour slot online; big hit for all 5 kids · Kids: All ages (hands-on tour)

places.name: Dialog im Dunkeln (Dialogue in the Dark)
places.near: U1 Meßberg, short walk into Speicherstadt
places.notes: Venue/location from chocoversum search context + dialog-in-hamburg.de; age fit estimated
places.famousFor: Blind guides lead you through everyday scenes in complete darkness — a famous empathy experience born in Hamburg
places.goodToKnow: ~90 min guided tours, advance booking essential; family tours offered — generally recommended from ~age 7-8 (check when booking; may be intense for the 5-year-old); English tours on select slots · Kids: Best 9+; too dark for 5yo

places.name: Hamburg Dungeon
places.near: U3 Baumwall, in the Speicherstadt block next to Miniatur Wunderland
places.notes: Age guidance from official/Tripadvisor 2026 pages
places.famousFor: 90 min of actor-led scary storytelling through Hamburg's dark history — plague, pirates, great fire — plus boat ride and free-fall tower
places.goodToKnow: Minimum recommended age 10 (reviews say better 12+) — one for the teens, NOT the 5/9-year-olds; under 15 needs adult; mostly German shows, selected English dates — check before booking · Kids: Best 11+ (scary); skip 5yo

places.name: Planetarium Hamburg
places.near: S-Bahn Alte Wöhr or U3 Borgweg, 10-15 min walk through Stadtpark
places.notes: Program/prices from planetarium-hamburg.de
places.famousFor: One of Europe's best planetariums inside a 1915 water tower — kids' star shows, 3D space journeys and a free rooftop viewing deck
places.setting: Star theatre in a water tower
places.goodToKnow: Closed Mondays; kids' shows from ~EUR 7.70, most shows in German (visuals still work) — check for English/music shows; combine with Stadtpark playgrounds · Kids: All ages (pick kids' show)

places.name: Stadtpark Hamburg
places.near: U3 Saarlandstraße or Borgweg
places.notes: hamburg.com park pages; concert series widely documented
places.famousFor: Hamburg's 'green living room' — giant lawns, lake with rowboat rental, big adventure playgrounds and the planetarium tower
places.goodToKnow: Free, open 24/7; paddling pool and large playground great for younger kids; open-air concerts on summer evenings (Stadtpark Open Air) — check Aug 2026 line-up · Kids: All ages; stroller-friendly

places.name: Rickmer Rickmers Museum Ship
places.near: U3/S1 Landungsbrücken, Ponton 1a
places.notes: rickmer-rickmers.de; prices estimated from recent listings
places.famousFor: Green-hulled 1896 tall ship moored at the piers — clamber through decks, engine room and crew quarters
places.goodToKnow: Open daily roughly 10:00-18:00; ~EUR 6-8 adults, kids less (est. — check site); 45-60 min visit; fun, hands-on scale for the younger kids; onboard restaurant · Location needs verification · Kids: Best 5+; steep ship stairs
places.address: Bei den St. Pauli-Landungsbrücken, Ponton 1a, 20359 Hamburg

places.name: Elbstrand Övelgönne (Elbe Beach)
places.near: HADAG ferry 62 from Landungsbrücken to Neumühlen/Övelgönne (covered by HVV ticket) — the ride itself is a mini harbour cruise
places.notes: Classic Hamburg spot; ferry-62 access per hamburg.com
places.famousFor: Real sandy beach on the Elbe where container giants glide past metres away — beach cafés like Strandperle, old captains' cottages along the path
places.goodToKnow: Free, always open; kids build sandcastles while ships pass — unique photo backdrop; NO swimming (strong currents, ship wash); sunset here is superb · Kids: All ages

places.name: Lübeck Old Town Day Trip
places.near: Direct train from Hamburg Hbf, ~24-50 min; old town 10-15 min walk from Lübeck station
places.notes: Train times/sights from omio & Lübeck travel guides in search results
places.famousFor: Fairy-tale UNESCO island old town — twin-towered Holstentor gate, gabled merchant houses, and Niederegger, the world's most famous marzipan house (since 1806)
places.goodToKnow: Easy self-guided day trip; Café Niederegger (Breite Str. 89) has a free marzipan museum upstairs — kids love the marzipan figures; Holstentor museum small fee; flat and stroller-friendly · Location needs verification · Kids: All ages; lots of walking

places.name: Heide Park Resort
places.near: ~1h by car via A7; or train to Soltau + shuttle bus
places.notes: 2026 hours/offers from heide-park.de
places.famousFor: Northern Germany's biggest theme park — Colossos wooden coaster (25th-anniversary events 2026), Peppa Pig Land and 30+ under-10 attractions
places.goodToKnow: Open daily in Aug ~10:00-18/19:00; book online for best price (day tickets vary by date); 2026 promo: kids up to 11 free with paying adult (to 30 Sep); covers ALL ages 5-17 in one day · Location needs verification · Kids: Height limits for 5yo

places.name: Wildpark Schwarze Berge
places.near: Car via A7 exit Marmstorf (~25 min) or bus 340 from S-Bahn Neuwiedenthal/Harburg
places.notes: 2026 prices/hours from wildpark-schwarze-berge.de via kidvoyage/hamburg.de
places.famousFor: 1,000 native animals to hand-feed (deer, goats), daily falconry flight show and a 45 m Elbblick tower looking back to Hamburg
places.goodToKnow: Open daily 8:00-18:00; adults ~EUR 16, kids ~EUR 14; bring/buy animal feed — reindeer take apples and carrots from kids' hands; huge playground; relaxed half-day, hidden gem vs. the zoo · Kids: All ages; stroller-friendly

places.name: Westfield Hamburg-Überseequartier
places.near: U4 Überseequartier exits straight into the mall
places.notes: Opening/tenants from westfield.com and hamburg.com mall pages
places.famousFor: Hamburg's newest district-mall (opened Apr 2025): 170+ shops incl. Breuninger luxury flagship, giant Zara, biggest Sephora in northern Germany, ~40 restaurants, cinema
places.goodToKnow: Shops roughly Mon-Sat 10:00-20:00 (restaurants/cinema later; closed Sun like most German retail); houses LEGO Discovery Centre + Port des Lumières — easy full family day · Kids: All ages (mall)

places.name: Alsterhaus
places.near: S/U Jungfernstieg, direct
places.notes: Hours from alsterhaus.de visit page
places.famousFor: Hamburg's grand 1912 luxury department store on the Binnenalster — 6 floors of designer fashion, beauty and a gourmet food hall (sister of Berlin's KaDeWe)
places.goodToKnow: Mon-Thu 10:00-20:00, Fri-Sat 10:00-21:00, CLOSED Sunday; top-floor food hall good family pit-stop; tax-free shopping desk for non-EU visitors · Kids: Adults & teens

places.name: Neuer Wall
places.near: S/U Jungfernstieg or U3 Rathaus, 2 min
places.notes: Hours from neuerwall-hamburg.de / hamburg.com
places.famousFor: Hamburg's most exclusive street — Louis Vuitton, Gucci, Hermès, jewellers and German designers along a canal-side boulevard
places.goodToKnow: Boutiques Mon-Fri ~10:00-19:00, Sat to 18:00, closed Sun; connects to Alsterarkaden and Stadthöfe passages — elegant rainy-day circuit; tax-free refunds in most flagships · Kids: Adults & teens

places.name: Europa Passage
places.near: S/U Jungfernstieg or U3 Rathaus, direct entrances
places.notes: Mall info from europa-passage.de; address matches saved-POI file
places.famousFor: 120+ shops on five glass-roofed levels between Binnenalster and Mönckebergstraße — the central-Hamburg mall with a big food level
places.goodToKnow: Mon-Sat ~10:00-20:00, closed Sun; mainstream brands (teens happy), FoodSky top floor incl. your saved Friends & Brgrs; useful AC break between Alster and Rathaus sights · Kids: All ages (mall)

places.name: Nivea Haus Flagship
places.near: S/U Jungfernstieg, on the Binnenalster promenade
places.notes: Nivea Haus Hamburg flagship per nivea.de; hours estimated retail norms
places.famousFor: Flagship of Hamburg-born NIVEA — exclusive products, Hamburg-edition tins (great gifts) and a day spa with express massages
places.goodToKnow: Retail Mon-Sat daytime (closed Sun, est.); personalized tin engraving often available; quick fun souvenir stop — NIVEA was invented in Hamburg in 1911 · Kids: Adults & teens

places.name: Designer Outlet Neumünster
places.near: ~50-60 min by car via A7; or train Hamburg Hbf to Neumünster + short taxi/bus
places.notes: McArthurGlen official outlet pages; hours approximate — verify before the drive
places.famousFor: North Germany's premium outlet village — 120+ designer brands (Boss, Armani, Coach, Karl Lagerfeld...) at 30-70% off in an open-air village
places.goodToKnow: Mon-Sat ~10:00-19:00, closed Sunday — plan a weekday; tax-free shopping for non-EU visitors; playground and family facilities on site; pairs well with a Lübeck or drive day · Kids: Adults & teens

places.name: Wasserschloss / Poggenmühlen-Brücke Photo Spot
places.near: U1 Meßberg, 5 min walk to Poggenmühlen-Brücke bridge
places.notes: Classic Speicherstadt viewpoint referenced across Hamburg tourism guides
places.famousFor: THE Hamburg postcard shot — the 'moated castle' house where two Speicherstadt canals meet, framed by red-brick warehouses
places.goodToKnow: Free, open 24/7; blue hour (just after sunset, ~21:30 in early Aug) gives the famous illuminated reflection shot; tripods common — arrive early for rail spot · Location needs verification · Kids: All ages (quick photo stop)

places.name: Alsterarkaden
places.near: S/U Jungfernstieg, 2 min walk
places.notes: Standard Hamburg shopping/photo landmark; hours estimated from area norms
places.famousFor: White Venetian-style arcades along the Alsterfleet canal with swans, boutique shopping and the classic Rathaus reflection shot
places.goodToKnow: Free public arcade, best light in the morning; shops keep normal retail hours (roughly Mon-Sat 10:00-19:00, est.); very Instagrammable with the Rathaus across the water · Kids: All ages

places.name: Dockland Viewing Platform
places.near: Ferry 62 to Dockland/Fischereihafen or S1/S3 Königstraße + walk
places.notes: Well-documented free Hamburg viewpoint (hamburg.com/travel guides); address per public listings
places.famousFor: Office building shaped like a ship's bow — free public stairs (~140 steps) to a rooftop deck with sweeping Elbe and harbour views
places.goodToKnow: Free, roof generally accessible daytime/evening; windy — hold hats; hidden-gem alternative to paid viewpoints; great at golden hour with cruise ships docking beside · Kids: All ages; stairs, no stroller

places.name: Blankenese Treppenviertel
places.near: S1 to Blankenese (~25 min from centre), then walk downhill; tiny bus 48 loops the hill if legs tire
places.notes: Standard Hamburg day-trip quarter, per hamburg.com/travel guides
places.famousFor: Mediterranean-feeling 'staircase quarter' — 5,000 steps of lanes between white villas tumbling down to the Elbe beach; Hamburg's most exclusive village
places.goodToKnow: Free to roam; wear comfy shoes (many stairs — consider carrier for the 5-year-old); combine with Elbe beach at the bottom and ice cream on Blankenese Strandweg; half-day trip · Kids: Hilly stairs; tiring for 5yo

places.name: Centrum-Moschee (Islamische Gemeinde Hamburg Centrum Moschee e.V.)
places.near: 10 min drive or U1/S-Bahn to Hauptbahnhof then 8 min walk up Steindamm; entrance on Böckmannstraße
places.notes: Address + hours verified via hamburg.de directory and Prayers Connect / Masjidway listings
places.famousFor: Hamburg's best-known central mosque, the anchor of the Steindamm Muslim quarter; full 5-daily prayers, Jumu'ah, halal shops and restaurants all around it
places.goodToKnow: Open daily approx. 08:00-20:00 for all prayers; phone 040 245629; busiest at Friday prayer

places.name: Muhajirin-Moschee (Der Islamische Bund e.V.)
places.near: Directly opposite Hamburg Hauptbahnhof east exit (Kirchenallee side); 5 min from Mönckebergstraße
places.notes: Listed with address on moscheentour.de (official St. Georg mosque tour site)
places.famousFor: Arab-community mosque directly on Kirchenallee facing the Hauptbahnhof — the handiest prayer stop when you are around the station or Mönckebergstraße shops
places.goodToKnow: Upper-floor musalla, Arabic khutbah; open for the 5 daily prayers

places.name: Vahdet-Moschee (Anatolisches Zentrum für islamische Kultur)
places.near: On Steindamm, 6 min walk from Hauptbahnhof; street parking difficult, use station garages
places.notes: Listed with address on moscheentour.de (official St. Georg mosque tour site)
places.famousFor: Turkish mosque right on Steindamm at no. 47 — same block as the ÖZKA halal butcher, so you can combine prayer with halal-grocery shopping
places.goodToKnow: Open for daily prayers and Jumu'ah; Turkish-speaking community

places.name: Al-Nour Moschee
places.area: Horn (10 min drive east of centre)
places.near: ~12 min drive from HafenCity via Amsinckstraße, or U2/U4 to Rauhes Haus; next to Hammer Kirche area
places.notes: Address verified via al-nour.de contact page, Wikipedia and Yelp
places.famousFor: Landmark mosque in a beautifully converted former Lutheran church (reopened 2018) — Hamburg's most striking modern mosque and an easy drive with the car
places.goodToKnow: Arabic-led congregation (Islamisches Zentrum Al-Nour e.V.); phone 040 28053914; worth seeing even outside prayer times

places.name: EDEKA Böcker Überseequartier
places.near: Walkable from anywhere in HafenCity; U4 Überseequartier; short-term parking in Überseequartier garages
places.notes: Address + hours verified via edeka.de store page and supermarktcheck.de
places.famousFor: The HafenCity neighbourhood full-range supermarket on Überseeboulevard — closest proper EDEKA to the apartments, good fresh produce and bakery
places.goodToKnow: Mon-Sat approx. 08:00-21:00, CLOSED Sunday (buy ahead for Sunday or use EDEKA Tamme at Hauptbahnhof)

places.name: REWE Westfield Hamburg-Überseequartier
places.near: U4 Überseequartier or drive into the Westfield car park; basement level of the mall
places.notes: Address + hours from hamburg.de branchenbuch listing for REWE HafenCity
places.famousFor: Big modern REWE in the basement of the new Westfield Überseequartier mall — longest weekday hours in HafenCity (until 23:00) and easy mall parking
places.goodToKnow: Mon-Sat 07:00-23:00, CLOSED Sunday; handy late-evening run after the kids are asleep

places.name: ÖZKA Fleischhandel und Schlachthaus (halal butcher)
places.near: Steindamm 47, 6 min walk from Hauptbahnhof; combine with prayer at the Vahdet-Moschee in the same block
places.notes: Active listing with photos on Yelp (updated 2026); Steindamm is Hamburg's halal-shopping street
places.famousFor: Proper halal butcher + Turkish market on Steindamm — fresh halal meat, fruit & veg; the classic stop if you plan to cook in the apartment
places.goodToKnow: Open Mon-Sat daytime; cash preferred at many Steindamm shops

places.name: Sönmez Market (Turkish grocery)
places.near: Steindamm 33, 5 min walk from Hauptbahnhof ZOB side
places.notes: Address verified via hamburg.de branchenbuch (Türkische Lebensmittel St. Georg)
places.famousFor: Long-standing Turkish supermarket at the start of Steindamm — halal cold cuts, spices, Turkish bread, dates, ayran; closest Arab-Turkish grocery to the Hauptbahnhof end
places.goodToKnow: Phone 040 244684; Mon-Sat; Sahin Market at Steindamm 87 is the backup option

places.name: EDEKA Tamme Wandelhalle (Sunday + late-night supermarket)
places.near: Wandelhalle (north concourse) of Hamburg Hauptbahnhof; 5-7 min drive from HafenCity, use the station parking garage
places.notes: 365-days/7-23 hours confirmed on edeka-tamme.de and hamburg.de
places.famousFor: THE Sunday/holiday lifesaver: full supermarket inside the Hauptbahnhof open 365 days a year 07:00-23:00 — station shops are exempt from Germany's Sunday closing law
places.goodToKnow: Open EVERY day incl. Sunday & holidays 07:00-23:00; also your late-night convenience option; cards accepted

places.name: Hauptbahnhof Apotheke Wandelhalle (pharmacy)
places.near: Wandelhalle of Hamburg Hauptbahnhof, next to EDEKA Tamme; 5-7 min drive from HafenCity
places.notes: Hours verified on hauptbahnhofapotheke.de official site
places.famousFor: The most useful central pharmacy for visitors — inside the station's Wandelhalle and open every day of the year including Sundays, 25+ years at this spot
places.goodToKnow: Open daily incl. Sunday approx. 08:00-21:00; phone 040 32527383; staff usually speak English; stocks children's fever meds (Nurofen/Paracetamol saft)

places.name: Apotheken-Notdienst (night/emergency pharmacy rotation)
places.near: Check aponet.de/apotheke/notdienstsuche/Hamburg for the nearest on-duty pharmacy each night, then drive there
places.notes: System + hotline 22833 verified via aponet.de and hamburg.de official Notdienst info page
places.famousFor: How after-hours medicine works in Germany: every night a rotating set of pharmacies stays open (Notdienst). Find tonight's duty pharmacy at aponet.de or call/SMS 22833 from a mobile (0800 0022833 free from landline)
places.goodToKnow: Duty pharmacies charge a small Notdienst fee (~2.50 EUR); ring the night bell at the door; roster changes daily at 08:00-09:00 · Location needs verification
places.address: Reference point: Hauptbahnhof Apotheke Wandelhalle, Glockengießerwall 8-10, 20095 Hamburg (open daily to 21:00 before Notdienst kicks in)

places.name: Express Waschcenter (laundromat + service wash)
places.near: Zimmerpforte at the corner of Hansaplatz, St. Georg; short drive or U1 Lohmühlenstraße
places.notes: Address + hours verified via express-waschcenter.de and hamburg.de branchenbuch
places.famousFor: Central coin-op laundromat that also does drop-off wash/iron service — the practical mid-trip laundry solution for a family of 7, 10 min from HafenCity
places.goodToKnow: Mon-Fri 08:00-19:00, Sat 08:00-18:00, closed Sunday; phone 040 2804655; drop bags in the morning, collect same day

places.name: AKK Altonaer Kinderkrankenhaus (children's emergency, 24h)
places.near: ~15-20 min drive west from HafenCity via the Elbe riverside; free-ish street parking scarce, hospital signage from Bleickenallee
places.notes: Address + 24h ZNA verified via kinderkrankenhaus.net and Hamburger Krankenhausspiegel
places.famousFor: Hamburg's dedicated children's hospital — 24h paediatric emergency department (ZNA), the standard answer for any child illness or injury during the trip
places.goodToKnow: Emergency dept open 24/7; phone 040 88908-0; for life-threatening emergencies always call 112; EU travel insurance / cash-card accepted, bring passports

places.name: Kinder-UKE Notaufnahme (university children's ER, 24h)
places.near: ~20 min drive north from HafenCity; enter UKE campus from Martinistraße, follow signs to Gebäude O47; visitor parking garages on campus
places.notes: Address, building O47 and 24h status verified via uke.de official pages
places.famousFor: Children's emergency room of Hamburg's university hospital (UKE) — top-tier paediatric care 24h for anyone under 18; the alternative to AKK on the north side
places.goodToKnow: Open 24 hours daily for under-18s; phone +49 40 7410-0; expect triage waits for non-urgent cases · Location needs verification

places.name: Saturn Mönckebergstraße (SIM cards + electronics)
places.near: Mönckebergstraße 1, next to Hauptbahnhof; 5-7 min drive from HafenCity or U3 Mönckebergstraße
places.notes: Address + hours verified via saturn.de store finder and Yelp (updated July 2026)
places.famousFor: One of Germany's biggest electronics stores (~18,000 m2 over multiple floors) at the head of Mönckebergstraße — prepaid German SIMs (Telekom/Vodafone/o2), chargers, adapters, kids' headphones
places.goodToKnow: Mon-Sat 10:00-20:00, CLOSED Sunday; bring a passport for prepaid SIM registration (German law)
